title: SARIF AI emit profile — novel rule descriptor object (--rules)
description: Input contract for a reportingDescriptor an AI producer supplies to add-reporting-descriptor --rules (stored under run.tool.driver.rules[]). It overlays ai-reporting-descriptor.schema.json by $ref — inheriting the non-empty string id requirement — and adds the single tightening the --rules path enforces: the id must begin with the NOVEL- escape-hatch prefix (AIRuleIdConvention.IsNovel). Taxonomy-mapped rule descriptors (e.g. CWE-89) come from the finalize-time taxonomy enricher, not this verb. The prefix gate is matched as-is (StartsWith), not the full novel grammar.

id.description: Novel-finding descriptor id. The non-empty string requirement is inherited from ai-reporting-descriptor; this overlay adds the verb's IsNovel prefix gate. Prefix only, so 'NOVEL-foo/bar' is accepted here even though the richer result-side ruleId grammar rejects it.
